name: docflow
description: Run API, Next.js, and Celery together for local development

scripts.dev:api: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.dev:worker: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m celery -A app.celery_app worker -l info
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,worker -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:worker"
